description_long: This ornate rifle features a robust, short barrel with intricate gold engravings and a metallic, ribbed midsection. The body is predominantly metallic with a bronze-gold finish, accented by decorative motifs and a dragon-shaped embellishment near the hammer. The grip is crafted from dark wood, carved with a diamond pattern and inlaid with gold, providing both visual appeal and ergonomic support. The trigger guard is elegantly curved, and the trigger itself is prominent and accessible. The muzzle is wide and flared, with additional gold detailing and a reinforced rim. The overall design suggests a blend of historical and fantasy aesthetics, making it both functional and decorative.
description: An ornate, gold-engraved rifle with a flared barrel, ribbed metallic body, and a carved wooden grip accented with gold. Decorative motifs and a dragon embellishment enhance its fantasy-inspired appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, flared muzzle and concentric gold detailing.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the full length, ornate engravings, dragon embellishment, and carved wooden grip.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the diamond-patterned wooden grip and the alignment of the barrel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the same ornate engravings, dragon detail, and the trigger mechanism.
